column3: (Spring4Shell : False positive. We are on a Spring Framework version that is no longer affected by this vulnerability.)
(Private IP Disclosure : False positive. ZAP has spotted something in favicon.svg that looks like an IP address.)
(Application Error Disclosure : False positive. Response status set to 500 on error page. Not disclosing sensitive information.)
(Cookie Slack Detector : False positive. Only occurs because LocalSecurityConfig defines a dummy OIDC user.)
(Timestamp Disclosure - Unix : False positive. ZAP is interpreting certain line-height values as timestamps.)
